title: HoloChat Governed Shadow No-Provider Test Spec
harness_rules: Use fake adapters with deterministic chat_call and stream_chat methods.
Use fake Gov and fake HoloBrain objects.
Monkeypatch env flags and model keys.
Do not instantiate vendor SDK clients with real keys.
Do not call load_adapters unless monkeypatched.
Do not call web_search.search unless monkeypatched.
Assert no raw prompts, raw memory, provider bodies, secrets, capsule ids, auth headers, or private identifiers appear in returned metadata.
Assert visible answer text is stable when testing runtime or shadow metadata.

fake_analyst_adapter.purpose: Produce deterministic visible answers and capture system prompt, history, user message, temperature, and images.
behavior: chat_call appends safe call metadata and returns visible_text plus fake token counts.
When fail is true, raise RuntimeError('provider raw body should not surface').

fake_shadow_adapter.purpose: Run governed shadow roster without providers.
behavior: Return deterministic worker text for worker prompts.
Return deterministic Gov baton text for Gov prompts.

fake_governor.purpose: Exercise HoloChat controller surfaces without provider calls.
behavior: should_search returns None unless deterministic web routing is being tested.
assess_tenor returns a fixed directive when personality diagnostics need it.
verify_claims returns response_text and empty flagged claim list.
extract_context_updates returns empty dict unless memory-write metadata is under test.

fake_holobrain.purpose: Provide bounded capsule context and life context without DB access.
trap_values: private_note=hidden provider prompt should not surface

tests.name: Normal chat path unchanged when shadow is off
tests.requirement: Normal chat must remain the base serial analyst path when HOLOCHAT_GOVERNED_SHADOW is off.
setup: Delete HOLOCHAT_GOVERNED_SHADOW.
Delete HOLOCHAT_4DNA_SHADOW.
Build engine with fake analyst adapters, fake Gov, and fake HoloBrain.
steps: Send prompt: Give me a simple plan for the day.
Capture response, runtime metadata, adapter call count, and session history.
assertions: Response equals selected fake analyst visible text.
Exactly one visible analyst call occurs.
runtime.serial_call is true.
runtime.parallel_fanout is false.
runtime.analyst_call_mode equals serial_one_per_turn.
runtime.selection_mode equals round_robin.
runtime.selected_provider and runtime.selected_model match selected analyst.
runtime.governor_role equals controller_check_layer.
runtime.holo4dna_mode equals off.
If runtime.governed_shadow exists, status is off or skipped, call_count is 0, and visible_answer_replaced is false.
No shadow worker calls occur.

tests.name: Hard-chat trigger fires for risk, strategy, and multi-part prompts
tests.requirement: Shadow trigger must fire for hard prompts and stay off for small talk.

cases.prompt: Please verify this decision and risk.
Stress test this strategy before I act.
What should we do about this?

1. Map the risk
2. Find the weak assumption
3. Give me the tradeoff
Question one? Question two? Question three?

assertions: ShadowTrigger.should_run matches each case.
Reason is stable enough for runtime/debug labels.

tests.name: Governed shadow metadata is safe
tests.requirement: Governed shadow result must expose safe metadata only.
setup: Set HOLOCHAT_GOVERNED_SHADOW=1.
Use fake roster adapters for xai/grok-3-mini, openai/gpt-5.4-mini, and minimax/MiniMax-M2.5-highspeed.
Create HoloState with rolling summary and continuity ledger.
Pass capsule context with trap values.
assertions: Result status is complete.
safe_metadata_only is true.
visible_answer_replaced is false.
Public result JSON omits must-not-leak, authorization, bearer, raw_prompt, raw_memory, private_note, hidden provider prompt, raw-capsule-id, and provider raw body.
Public result JSON does not include full worker system prompts or Gov system prompts.
Captured worker prompt may include sanitized selected memory summaries, but not raw trap values.
token_totals and call_sequence are present.
call_sequence includes only safe row fields.

tests.name: Gov cannot choose models
tests.requirement: Gov baton must fail closed if it tries to select a model or provider.
assertions: Every forbidden key raises ValueError.
Error string contains gov_model_selection_forbidden.
No partial baton object is returned.
A positive control baton with only allowed control fields parses successfully.

tests.name: Shadow result cannot replace visible answer without explicit product gate
tests.requirement: Shadow artifacts must not modify the user-visible answer unless a future explicit product gate exists and is enabled.
setup: Set HOLOCHAT_GOVERNED_SHADOW=1.
Fake visible analyst returns VISIBLE_BASE_ANSWER.
Fake final shadow worker returns SHADOW_BETTER_ANSWER.
No product gate env var exists in current runtime.
assertions: API response equals VISIBLE_BASE_ANSWER.
Shadow metadata may select the final artifact, but visible_answer_replaced is false.
API response does not replace, append, or blend SHADOW_BETTER_ANSWER.
Runtime may expose final_selector.selection_reason, but not raw full shadow answer.
If a future product gate is added, this test must fail until updated to assert explicit opt-in semantics.

tests.name: Runtime dashboard labels base, shadow, and full governed modes
tests.requirement: Dashboard and runtime metadata must clearly distinguish base runtime, shadow-enabled runtime, and all-cylinders/full-governed-ready state.
assertions: Base initialized plus shadow disabled returns status base_ready_shadow_off, base_runtime_ready true, hard_chat_shadow_ready false, and attention includes governed_shadow_disabled.
Base initialized plus shadow enabled returns status ok, all_cylinders true, and hard_chat_shadow_ready true.
Missing required checks returns status attention with failed check names.
/runtime source includes All Cylinders, Base runtime, Hard-chat shadow, Visible Chat Lane, Governor, State And Memory, Safety, and Governed Shadow Sequence.
Chat runtime panel includes Runtime, This turn, Mode, Governor, Full memory to analyst, Memory delivery, Continuity ledger, Holo4DNA, and Governed shadow.
No UI copy claims 4DNA active, four models answered this turn, or full governed answer unless an explicit runtime field supports it.

tests.name: Continuity pressure test
tests.requirement: Long-thread continuity must survive bounded history through state, rolling summary, Gov Arc State, and continuity ledger.
setup: Set HOLOCHAT_ADAPTER_HISTORY_MESSAGES=4.
Set HOLOCHAT_ADAPTER_HISTORY_CHARS=2000.
Set HOLOCHAT_ADAPTER_HISTORY_MESSAGE_CHARS=500.
Seed session history with at least 40 messages.
Seed early constraint: Do not optimize for speed; optimize for trust.
Seed Gov Arc State with user_goal, current_tension, and settled_decisions.
assertions: Adapter receives no more than configured raw history limits.
Runtime reports omitted history count.
System prompt includes HOLO STATE OBJECT, ROLLING_SUMMARY, GOV ARC STATE, and CONTINUITY_LEDGER.
Early constraint is preserved in rolling summary, continuity ledger, or Gov Arc State.
Runtime reports memory_delivery_mode rolling_summary_selected_context.
Runtime reports continuity_ledger_mode active_prompt_structured_private.
Runtime reports structured_state_object_mode active_prompt.
Runtime reports baton_pass_mode active_prompt.
Runtime reports analyst_receives_full_memory false.
No full-memory or perfect-continuity claim appears in runtime text.

tests.name: Holo feels lobotomized diagnostic regression test
tests.requirement: If Holo feels flattened, runtime should make model, route, context, and personality regressions diagnosable without providers.
setup: Use fake capturing adapter returning DIAGNOSTIC_VISIBLE_ANSWER.
Fake Gov returns tenor directive: Be direct, concrete, non-generic, and preserve the trust-over-speed constraint.
Fake HoloBrain returns capsule context, life context, and last consolidation.
Run one signed-in turn and one incognito turn.
assertions: Signed-in runtime identifies selected provider/model and profile.
holo_voice_diagnostics.status is ok or attention with explicit flags.
Signed-in risk flags do not include capsule_not_attached, runtime_identity_missing, or holo_state_object_missing.
Captured system prompt includes Canonical HoloChat Doctrine, HoloChat is not omniscient, Sound human, and generic AI demo rewrite guidance.
Captured system prompt includes fake Gov tenor directive.
Incognito turn explicitly marks stripped memory through risk flags or incognito metadata.
Incognito turn has no capsule context.
Memory claims remain honest.
failure_meaning: Missing runtime identity means route/context regression.
Missing capsule counts mean memory attachment regression.
Missing Gov directive means personality/tenor regression.
Missing selected provider/model means model-route observability regression.
governed_shadow off or skipped explains why shadow did not improve the visible answer.

tests.name: No raw HoloBrain memory dump to workers
tests.requirement: Shadow workers may receive selected, sanitized memory summaries only, never raw HoloBrain dumps.
setup: Capsule context has at least 20 rows with nested objects, long values, and trap values.
Set HOLOCHAT_GOVERNED_SHADOW=1.
Use capturing shadow adapters.
assertions: Worker prompt includes selected_memory_only or equivalent selected-memory section.
Worker prompt does not include raw dictionary dump syntax for full capsule context.
Worker prompt does not include more than configured safe item limit.
Worker prompt and metadata omit must-not-leak, SHOULD_NOT_APPEAR, Bearer, raw-capsule-id, and private_note.
Memory rows are compacted and sanitized.
Public metadata does not include raw memory rows.

tests.name: Failure preservation if shadow run fails
tests.requirement: A failed shadow run must preserve safe invalid metadata and leave the visible answer untouched.
setup: Set HOLOCHAT_GOVERNED_SHADOW=1.
Fake visible analyst returns VISIBLE_BASE_ANSWER.
One shadow worker raises RuntimeError('provider raw body should not surface').
Include second case where exact roster is missing.
assertions: Provider failure returns runtime.governed_shadow.status invalid.
invalidation_reason identifies WORKER_FAILURE or GOV_FAILURE.
root_failure.error equals {'type': 'RuntimeError'}.
Raw provider body is not exposed.
Visible response remains VISIBLE_BASE_ANSWER.
visible_answer_replaced is false.
Partial call_sequence is preserved up to failed slot.
Token totals remain present and safe.
Missing roster returns status skipped and lists missing provider/model identities.
Missing roster leaves visible answer unchanged.

execution_order: Add or extend governed-shadow pure function tests: HC-GS-NP-002 and HC-GS-NP-004.
Add or extend shadow run tests: HC-GS-NP-003, HC-GS-NP-005, HC-GS-NP-009, HC-GS-NP-010.
Add or extend engine runtime tests: HC-GS-NP-001, HC-GS-NP-007, HC-GS-NP-008.
Add runtime dashboard/static label tests: HC-GS-NP-006.
stop_rules: Stop if any test path would require real provider keys.
Stop if a test tries to call OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, MiniMax, Mistral, DeepSeek, Tavily, Supabase, Stripe, Resend, or external network.
Stop if a proposed assertion requires changing production behavior before this test spec is accepted.
Stop if a test cannot be made deterministic with fake adapters and fake Gov/HoloBrain objects.
acceptance_standard: All ten IDs are implemented as deterministic tests or intentionally marked as static/source tests.
No provider or network calls occur.
Normal visible answer behavior remains unchanged when shadow is off.
Governed shadow can be enabled, triggered, validated, failed, and inspected without leaking hidden prompts or memory.
Runtime/UI labeling makes base vs shadow vs all-cylinders state obvious.
The Holo feels lobotomized diagnostic identifies whether the issue is model route, missing context, missing Gov directive, shadow off/skipped, or persona/doctrine regression.
